content_body:
Spice up the holidays with an experience your family will treasure for years to come. Give the gift of a Blue Ridge vacation and spend Christmas in the North Georgia Mountains! Brisk winter air, foggy mountain mornings, and small town Christmas spirit is holiday bliss in its purest form.

A Christmas cabin escape in Blue Ridge offers a festive experience you've only seen on the Hallmark channel. Live out your dreams of cozying up by the fireplace, preparing a beautiful Christmas dinner in a gourmet kitchen, or exploring the downtown festivities. 

Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers some of the area's most sought-after mountain and riverfront luxury cabins that are perfect for families, couples, and large groups.

If you’re searching for the perfect Christmas cabins in Georgia, consider this your sign to keep reading.

Why Blue Ridge, Georgia Is the Perfect Christmas Cabin Destination

Just 90 miles due north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge combines rustic mountain charm with entertaining activities for all ages. The slower pace offers a reprieve from the daily routine, and its convenient location lends itself to family and friends gathering together.

What to Expect From December in Blue Ridge:

  • Cool winter weather with highs in the mid 50s and lows in the 30s, ideal for morning coffee by the fire and evenings in the hot tub
  • A decorated, walkable downtown, complete with boutiques, restaurants, and entertaining attractions
  • Seasonal events, including light displays, live music, and the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway Christmas train

For explorers seeking the perfect blend of nostalgia, comfort, and holiday magic, Blue Ridge is the shining star.

Best Christmas Cabins in Georgia


Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Our hand-picked luxury cabins are thoughtfully designed for holiday getaways. Whether you’re escaping for a romantic Christmas or planning a multigenerational holiday reunion, there’s a Blue Ridge cabin ready to welcome you.

Romantic Christmas Cabins (2 Bedrooms)


Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

Ideal for couples looking to slow down and savor the season with quality time.

  • Creekfront
  • Cozy fire pits/wood-burning fireplaces
  • Secluded

Family-Friendly Christmas Cabins (3–4 Bedrooms)


Skyfall

Perfect for creating new traditions with the kids.

  • Spacious living rooms with fireplaces for gift opening
  • Fully equipped gourmet kitchens
  • Game rooms with pool table, arcade, shuffleboard, etc.

Large Group Christmas Cabins (5 Bedrooms)


Fallen Timber Lodge

Designed for holiday reunions and multigenerational stays.

  • Large dining tables for Christmas dinner
  • Expansive decks with panoramic views
  • Indoor and outdoor fireplaces for hot cocoa and movie nights

With features like waterfront access, chef’s kitchens, and multiple floors to spread out, our properties set a new standard for Christmas cabins in Georgia.

Top Christmas Amenities to Look For in a Georgia Cabin Rental


Courtesy of Past Guests

The magic of a cabin at Christmas rests in its amenities. When you can easily imagine yourself in the space surrounded by family, you know you have found the perfect vacation rental. Here are a few of the top amenities to elevate your Christmas vacation!

  • Indoor and Outdoor Fireplaces
    The centerpiece of a Christmas morning is perfect for stockings, hot chocolate, and cozy family photos. Our luxury cabin rentals with fireplaces offer gas or wood-burning options!
  • Gourmet Kitchens
    Spacious granite countertops, stainless appliances, gas ranges, and an array of utensils and dishes make holiday meals a joy to prepare.
  • Hot Tubs With Views
    Recap your day in the mountains with a glass of bubbly in a hot tub with soothing, slower-paced Christmas music in the background. Browse our cabins with hot tubs here. 
  • Photo-Ready Spaces
    Open floor plans, vaulted ceilings, and window walls provide stunning backdrops for holiday photos.

When you are reserving a Blue Ridge Christmas cabin, you are booking not just a vacation rental, but a launchpad for cherished memories with your family and friends.

Things to Do in Blue Ridge, GA at Christmas

A Christmas trip to Blue Ridge is full of festive small town charm. Downtown Blue Ridge is only 5-20 minutes away from any of our cabins, and activities for all ages are sprinkled in and around the area. Top holiday activities include:

  • Blue Ridge Scenic Railway Holiday Express

A child-favorite featuring Santa, storytelling, and holiday treats as the train winds along the Toccoa River from Downtown Blue Ridge to Downtown McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN.

  • Downtown Blue Ridge Shopping & Dining

Explore a variety of boutiques, art galleries, entertaining attractions, wine bars, and restaurants all dressed in festive décor. From women's clothing to escape rooms and chocolatier's to mini golf, Downtown Blue Ridge has it all.

  • Visit Mercier Orchards

Sip hot cider, pick up holiday pies, or shop for local gifts and seasonal treats. This historical orchard is worth the hype as one of the quintessential Blue Ridge businesses.

  • Ice Skating Rink

Swing by the Blue Ridge on Ice rink and spend an afternoon or evening skating! Perfect for couples or those with young kids, this is the perfect Christmas activity for your bucket list.

  • Scenic Hikes and Waterfalls

Mild December weather makes hiking in the Aska Adventure Area or around Lake Blue Ridge perfect for holiday hikes. Some of our favorites include The Swinging Bridge, Brasstown Bald, and Long Creek Falls.

  • Wineries & Vineyards

Toast the season surrounded by mountain views at Roo Mountain Vineyards, Kerith House Winery, or Living Water Winery.

Blue Ridge offers the perfect blend of a peaceful mountain town and festive fun.

Plan Your Christmas in Blue Ridge Today


Cohutta Sunset

For more than two decades, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has welcomed many a holiday guest, and one sentiment always prevails: the memories made in a luxury Christmas cabin are priceless. From our prompt guest support to local recommendations, we are dedicated to ensuring that your holiday vacation is a success.

Whether you’re gathering with family, escaping for a romantic holiday, or starting a new tradition, Blue Ridge offers the perfect setting for unforgettable memories.Explore our luxury Christmas cabins in Georgia, check availability, and secure your magical mountain Christmas!
title: Christmas Cabins in Georgia: Your Guide to a Blue Ridge Holiday
